steps.title: Identify the two clauses
steps.content: Before the blank, "The measurement is based on how much and how quickly weight can be moved" is an independent clause. After the blank, the clause beginning "one unit of mechanical horsepower is equivalent to the amount of power" is another independent clause that gives an example.

steps.title: Use semicolon plus comma
steps.content: Choice A and choice B create comma splices by joining two independent clauses with only a comma. Choice D creates a run-on by using no punctuation. The remaining choice uses moved; for example, with a semicolon before the transition and a comma after it. The answer is C.
